title: Svelte
topic: Svelte 5 (client-side only, no SvelteKit or SSR)
summary: A concise, example-first tour of Svelte 5's rune-based reactivity — $state, $derived, $effect, $props/$bindable, snippets, control flow, bindings, transitions, and how to share state — in a bold yellow/blue/red/gray zine-styled light theme.

images.prompt: An editorial, zine-style flat-vector illustration: a bold yellow lightning-bolt spark leaping between three labeled boxes arranged like a circuit on a clean white background — a solid box, an arrow, a dashed outline box mid-transformation, and a glowing box — evoking reactive state flowing through a UI. Playful, bold, hand-inked outlines, light halftone dot shading, a tight palette of yellow, blue, red and charcoal gray only, generous white space, no text baked in. Target ~1200x800px, 3:2 landscape; composed for a small on-page figure with the subject centered and safe margins — it is letterboxed into a 3:2 box, so keep nothing important near the edges.
images.alt: A bold yellow spark leaping between labeled boxes, evoking reactive state flowing through a UI
images.caption: State changes. The UI reacts. That's the whole idea.

images.prompt: A bold, playful editorial zine illustration: a tall "Parent" box handing a labeled gift-wrapped parcel down a one-way arrow to a shorter "Child" box below it — clean flat vector style, hand-inked outlines. Beside it, a second thin dashed arrow loops back up from the child box to the parent box, glowing, labeled with a small padlock-unlocked icon to suggest an opt-in two-way channel. Strict palette of yellow, blue, red and charcoal gray only on white, halftone dot shading, generous whitespace, no text baked in. Target ~1280x720px, 16:9 landscape; compose for a small on-page figure with the subject centred and safe margins — it is letterboxed into a 16:9 box, so keep nothing important near the edges.
images.alt: A parent box handing a labeled parcel down to a child box, with a second dashed thread pulling a value back up
images.caption: Props flow down by default. $bindable opens one labeled door back up.

images.prompt: A bold, playful editorial zine illustration: a wooden rubber stamp with a curly-brace glyph carved into its face, mid-stamp, printing three identical small card-shaped icons in a row onto a white page, each print slightly offset like a real ink stamp. Flat vector style, hand-inked outlines, halftone dot shading, strict palette of yellow, blue, red and charcoal gray only, generous whitespace, no text baked in. Target ~1280x720px, 16:9 landscape; compose for a small on-page figure with the subject centred and safe margins — it is letterboxed into a 16:9 box, so keep nothing important near the edges.
images.alt: A rubber stamp labeled with curly braces striking identical prints of a small card motif across a page
images.caption: A snippet is a stamp: declare the shape once, print it as many times as you need.

images.prompt: A dynamic, playful editorial zine illustration: a small rounded card mid-flight, motion speed-lines trailing behind it in blue, flying through a dashed doorway/threshold outline (representing a DOM boundary) onto a stage floor. Flat vector style, hand-inked outlines, halftone dot shading for depth, strict palette of yellow, blue, red and charcoal gray only on white, generous whitespace, no text baked in. Target ~1280x720px, 16:9 landscape; compose for a small on-page figure with the subject centred and safe margins — it is letterboxed into a 16:9 box, so keep nothing important near the edges.
images.alt: A card mid-flight leaving speed-lines behind it as it flies onto a stage, with a dashed doorway marking the DOM boundary it crossed
images.caption: Entering and leaving are events Svelte lets you animate — not just style changes.

images.prompt: A bold editorial zine illustration: a single glowing hub node at the center with three thin glowing threads radiating outward to three small satellite boxes, like a subway map or a simple constellation — evoking one shared piece of state read by several components at once. Flat vector style, hand-inked outlines, halftone dot shading, strict palette of yellow, blue, red and charcoal gray only on white, generous whitespace, no text baked in. Target ~1280x720px, 16:9 landscape; compose for a small on-page figure with the subject centred and safe margins — it is letterboxed into a 16:9 box, so keep nothing important near the edges.
images.alt: A glowing hub node with three threads reaching out to satellite component boxes, evoking shared state radiating outward
images.caption: One shared object, read from wherever it's imported or provided.
